lede: Our automatic bays run on a simple traffic-light system. Wait for green, pull forward slow, hit the stop signal, and let the timer count down.

steps.description: Tap, card, cash, or token — Apple Pay too. Pick your wash (8, 9, 10, or 12) and confirm.
steps.title: Pay at the station

steps.description: Don't pull in unless you have a green light. Red & yellow mean wait.
steps.title: Wait for green

steps.description: Pull forward slowly. Hit the RED STOP signal, then put your car in park and sit tight.
steps.title: Pull in & park

steps.description: Check the countdown timer straight ahead. When the door opens and the dryers finish, pull through.
steps.title: Watch the timer
